title: 13 Seater Bus Driver (BDVL)
description:
7B Limousines Services Pte. Ltd. is a leading provider of premium chauffeured and corporate transport solutions in Singapore. We operate an exclusive fleet of 13-seater mini-buses, serving both local and international clients for school, corporate, and tour requirements.


Position: 13-Seater Bus Driver
Location: Islandwide (based in Singapore)


Responsibilities:

  • Drive 13-seater buses only for school trips, corporate transfers, airport transfers, disposal jobs, and local tours.
  • Ensure safe, punctual, and professional transport of passengers at all times.
  • Maintain vehicle cleanliness and ensure regular checks on vehicle condition.
  • Follow company SOPs and uphold service standards.
  • Report any incidents, delays, or maintenance issues promptly.
  • Communicate closely with the Operations Manager for daily trip coordination and instructions.
  • Submit trip reports or updates for every pickup and drop-off through the company’s reporting system or WhatsApp group.

Requirements:

  • Minimum Class 3 Driving Licence.
  • At least 2 years of driving experience in Singapore.
  • Must hold a valid Bus Driver Vocational Licence (BDVL).
  • Good knowledge of Singapore roads and traffic regulations.
  • Responsible, punctual, and well-presented.
  • Able to work flexible hours, including mornings, evenings, weekends, and public holidays.

What We Offer:

  • Basic salary package with trip incentives.
  • 6-day work week with fixed daily trips and minimal changes.
  • Vehicle can be driven home.
  • Diesel chip provided.
  • Stable, long-term employment with a reputable transport company.
  • Supportive and professional work environment.


Interested applicants may call or What's App to Kaviraj 90077525

postedCompany.description:
7B Limousine Services Pte. Ltd. is a premium provider of private transportation solutions in Singapore. Known for our commitment to quality, professionalism, and customer service, we are expanding our team to meet growing demand. We’re seeking dedicated, safety-conscious bus drivers who are passionate about providing a high standard of service and creating a comfortable experience for our passengers.

When you join 7B Limousine Services, you’re not just a driver—you’re a key part of our reputation for quality and service. Our team enjoys fair pay, steady schedules, and the pride of knowing they make a difference in the lives of our clients every day. With us, you’ll find a professional yet supportive environment, opportunities for growth, and the satisfaction of driving for a trusted, top-tier brand in the industry.


Ride in Luxury, Arrive in Style
Buses to Limousines. Your Journey, Our Priority.
postedCompany.name: 7B LIMOUSINES SERVICES PTE. LTD.
